title: orchis × kerneriorum
intro: Orchis × kerneriorum, also known as the man Orchid, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the green-winged Orchis (Orchis morio) and the Purpurea Orchid (Orchis purpurea). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the nervous system and act as a diuretic. In terms of health benefits, it has been traditionally used to treat various conditions such as impotence, infertility, and menstrual irregularities. The herbal preparation of Orchis × kerneriorum is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or dried extracts, which are then consumed orally or applied topically for therapeutic purposes.
